description_long: This modern bungalow is a two-story residential building surrounded by a tall, manicured hedge, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The structure features a flat roof with a green rooftop section, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a spacious balcony overlooking a pool. The front facade is characterized by a mix of glass and concrete, with a driveway leading to a covered entrance. The backyard includes a wooden gazebo set on a circular platform, as well as mature trees and landscaped greenery. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, balcony, pool, gazebo, and lush landscaping enclosed by a tall hedge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony, pool, and driveway framed by a hedge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, vertical window arrangement, and gazebo in the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the hedge-enclosed backyard, gazebo, and mature trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, side entrance, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
